## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with "x" -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing
<!-- Describe the testing you've done -->

- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] Added new tests for this feature
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Code Quality
<!-- Verify code quality checks -->

- [ ] `clang-format` applied (no formatting issues)
- [ ] `cppcheck` passes (no static analysis warnings)
- [ ] `clang-tidy` passes (no code quality issues)
- [ ] Memory sanitizer passes (AddressSanitizer/UBSanitizer)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass

## Documentation
<!-- Check if documentation needs updating -->

- [ ] Updated relevant README sections
- [ ] Updated API documentation (header files)
- [ ] Updated man page if CLI behavior changed
- [ ] Updated CONTRIBUTING.md if process changes

## Checklist
<!-- Final review before submitting -->

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have verified that my changes work correctly
